entry.title: Goodbye Rocko
entry.summary: Goodbye Rocko Goodbye Rocko, I finished this part of life journey with you. Thanks for the good time and bad time. Good luck to you and good luck to me, good luck to everyone.

entry.title: Nuget Restore vs Dotnet Restore in .NET Project

link.title: Nuget Restore vs Dotnet Restore in .NET Project

entry.summary: Restore NuGet Packages Package Restore installs the direct dependencies of a project as needed and then installs any dependencies of those packages throughout the entire dependency graph. Restore command only adds packages to the disk; it does not change a project’s dependencies. To change a project’s dependencies, modify packages.config file then restore pacakages again. Clear NuGet Packages Clear NuGet packages is an action that removes already installed NuGet caches from the cache locati...
